# init(options:)

**Initializer**

Initializes the media library based on the specified load options.

## Declaration

```swift
init(options: [String : Any] = [:])
```

## Parameters

- **options**: A dictionary of load options.

## Return Value

A new media library.

## Discussion

For descriptions of possible load options, see [doc://com.apple.medialibrary/documentation/MediaLibrary/load-options-keys].
title: init(options:)
